label: What We Do
heading: Specialist behaviour support, from assessment to implementation.

items.title: Behaviour Support Plans
items.desc: Comprehensive BSPs developed in collaboration with clients, families, and allied health professionals. We take the time to understand the whole person — not just the behaviour.

items.title: Behaviour Management
items.desc: Individualised behaviour management strategies grounded in evidence-based practice. We focus on proactive approaches, skill-building, and environmental adjustments.

items.title: Support Coordination
items.desc: Guidance navigating your NDIS plan, connecting you with the right services, and ensuring you get the most from your funded supports.

items.title: Allied Health Liaison
items.desc: We work alongside psychologists, occupational therapists, and speech pathologists to ensure a cohesive, multidisciplinary approach to your support.

items.title: Daily Living Support
items.desc: Personalised in-home and community support to build independence, life skills, and meaningful participation in everyday life.

items.title: Training & Advice
items.desc: Training for support workers and families on behaviour management approaches, restrictive practices awareness, and positive behaviour support.
